member.name: T:Hbar
member.summary:
Represents a quantity of hbar.

Implemented as a wrapper class to force handling of units. Direct interfacing with Hedera accepts amounts in Tinybars however the nominal unit is hbar.

member.name: M:Hbar.FromTinybars(0)
member.summary: A constant value of zero hbars.

member.name: M:Hbar.From(50000000000)
member.summary: A constant value of the maximum number of hbars.

member.name: M:Hbar.From(-)
member.summary: A constant value of the minimum number of hbars.

member.name: M:Hbar.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.summary: Constructs a new Hbar of the specified value.

member.name: M:Hbar.#ctor(BigDecimal)
member.summary:
Constructs a new Hbar of the specified, possibly fractional value.

The equivalent amount in Tinybar must be an integer and fit in a {@code long} (64-bit signed integer).

E.g., {@code 1.23456789} is a valid amount of hbar but {@code 0.123456789} is not.

The amount of Hbar

member.name: M:Hbar.#ctor(System.Int64,HbarUnit)
member.summary: Constructs a new hbar of the specified value in the specified unit. {@link HbarUnit}

member.name: M:Hbar.#ctor(BigDecimal,HbarUnit)
member.summary: Constructs a new hbar of the specified value in the specified unit. {@link HbarUnit}

member.name: M:Hbar.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the provided string into an amount of hbars.
member.param: The string representing the amount of Hbar

member.name: M:Hbar.FromString(System.String,HbarUnit)
member.summary: Converts the provided string into an amount of hbars.
member.param: The string representing the amount of set units
The unit to convert from to Hbar

member.name: M:Hbar.From(System.Int64)
member.summary: Returns an Hbar whose value is equal to the specified long.

member.name: M:Hbar.From(System.Int64,HbarUnit)
member.summary: Returns an Hbar representing the value in the given units.
member.param: The long representing the amount of set units
The unit to convert from to Hbar

member.name: M:Hbar.From(BigDecimal)
member.summary: Returns an Hbar whose value is equal to the specified long.
member.param: The BigDecimal representing the amount of Hbar

member.name: M:Hbar.From(BigDecimal,HbarUnit)
member.summary: Returns an Hbar representing the value in the given units.
member.param: The BigDecimal representing the amount of set units
The unit to convert from to Hbar

member.name: M:Hbar.FromTinybars(System.Int64)
member.summary: Returns an Hbar converted from the specified number of Tinybars.
member.param: The long representing the amount of Tinybar

member.name: M:Hbar.FromTinybars(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Returns an Hbar converted from the specified number of Tinybars.
member.param: The long representing the amount of Tinybar

member.name: M:Hbar.To(HbarUnit)
member.summary: Convert this hbar value to a different unit.
member.param: The unit to convert to from Hbar

member.name: M:Hbar.ToTinybars
member.summary: Convert this hbar value to Tinybars.

member.name: M:Hbar.GetValue
member.summary: Returns the number of Hbars.

member.name: M:Hbar.Negated
member.summary: Returns a Hbar whose value is {@code -this}.

member.name: M:Hbar.ToString(HbarUnit)
member.summary: Convert hbar to string representation in specified units.
